message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as Actor
participant Boundary as Boundary
participant Entity as Entity
participant Control as Control

Actor ->> Boundary : authorization Request
Boundary -> Entity : gson.fromJson(user, User.class)
Boundary -> Control : userService.userValidation(user)
Control -> Control : tokenService.createToken(user.getName())
Control -> Boundary : Token
Boundary -> Actor : authorization Response Token

@enduml
